subcodes.first_line: We have beheld thy letter and hearkened unto thy call. God willing, in this spiritual morn, from the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات را دیدیم و ندایت را شنیدیم انشاء الله درین بامداد روحانی از انوار
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Greatest Name, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
